title: Decision: Design System v3 Token Naming Convention
content_summary: Decision to adopt semantic token naming in v3. All color tokens renamed from palette-based (blue-500) to semantic (color-primary-default). Breaking change for all consumers.
author: Amara Osei

decision_log.title: Semantic token naming for design system v3
decision_log.decision: All design tokens renamed to semantic convention. Old palette names deprecated. Migration guide published.
decision_log.rationale: Palette naming tightly couples tokens to specific colors, making theme changes impossible. Semantic naming enables theming.
alternatives_considered: Alias old names to new names

title: NotificationBell — Design Review Findings
content_summary: Design review found three separate notification bell implementations across the platform: Nova canonical, Horizon custom, and Forge StatusIndicator. Action: all teams to adopt Nova canonical in Q3.
author: Amara Osei
